title: Talking Tables Table Kind 150 Bulk Pack Eco-Friendly White Paper Plates for Catering & Everyday Use, Recyclable Round Disposable Dishes Birthday Party Supplies, Home Compostable Made in EU 22CM
features: TABLE KIND | 150 BULK PACK | 22CM | Eco-Friendly Paper Plates for Catering & Everyday Use, Eco-Friendly, Recyclable & Sustainable Disposable Tableware, Party Supplies, Home Compostable, | Made in EU |
MADE IN THE EU, these paper plates meet high-quality standards, providing a touch of sophistication to your table settings for parties, catering events, and everyday use.
SUSTAINABLE AND RECYCLABLE: Make a sustainable choice with these white plates, designed for minimal environmental impact. Dispose of them responsibly, knowing they are FSC-certified and recyclable.

VERSATILE 150-PACK: With 150 white paper plates included per pack, these versatile disposable paper plates are perfect for gatherings, events, and everyday use at home, guaranteeing an abundant supply for any occasion.
CATERING EVENTS: Perfect for serving food at BBQ buffets, restaurants, festivals and parties, kids crafting, highly versatile, these plates can be used for both hot and cold foods.
CONVINIENT for family gatherings with easy cleanup, these plates are sturdy and reliable, offering good value paper plates.
description: Product Description White Paper Plates Table Kind introduces our 150-pack of 22cm White Paper Plates! Made in the EU, these plates are perfect for all occasions - parties, catering, and everyday use. Versatile and convenient, they're ideal for both hot and cold foods, making cleanup a breeze. Plus, they're a sustainable choice! Charity is at the heart of us We host parties for elderly residents in our local community. Here's a pic from our annual bingo event held at our office this summer. We love our planet Here is a few of the Talking Tables team enjoying a tree planting day in Guilford 400 trees were planted :) Meet The Talking Tables Team Here's a picture of our team enjoying a summer social event, it was was a lovely sunny day in London!
